testimonials.name: Rajesh Kulkarni
testimonials.quote: Booked our family trip to Dubai through D S Travels. Everything was perfectly organized — flights, hotel, even the airport transfers. Will definitely book again!

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Got last-minute tickets to Goa at an amazing price. The team on WhatsApp responded within minutes and had everything sorted in under an hour. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Amit Mehta
testimonials.quote: We've been booking all our business travel through D S Travels for over a year now. Always reliable, always great rates. They also helped us with comprehensive travel insurance.

about.heroDescription: D S Travels specialises in corporate and SME bookings with significantly lower cancellation charges. Our flight fares and hotel rates beat the major portals — because we work directly with airline and hotel partners.
about.footerText: Pune's specialist in corporate and SME travel bookings. Lower cancellation charges, competitive sale fares, and hotel rates that beat the major portals. Let us handle your travel.
